steps.t: Ingelfled can be found in the village Arhaim in Duskenvale. You talk to Ingelfled.
Ingelfled said that truffles could be found in the boar wallow south of Arhaim. You should bring Noffer to the boar wallow and have him search for tru…
Ingelfled can be found in the village of Arhaim in Duskenvale. You should bring the truffles and Noffer to Ingelfled.
